title: linum altaicum subsp. atricalyx
intro: Linum altaicum subsp. atricalyx, also known as the Altai flax or Atricalyx flax, is a subspecies of the Linum altaicum plant, a flowering plant in the family Linaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin and wound conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Linum altaicum subsp. atricalyx include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and it is often used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
